subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the All-Merciful unto His servant, that He may draw him unto the Dayspring of the Cause with a countenance illumined by the lights of the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی الرحمن عبده لیجذبه الی مطلع الامر بوجه کان بانوار العرش مضیئا انا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
